WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – WIP JOB ASSEMBLY COMPLETION (CC)

## **WIP JOB ASSEMBLY COMPLETION (COMMON CRADLE)**

As part of the physical assembly process, it is required to perform an 'Assembly Completion' in Oracle for each cradle assembly that is configured.

![](_page_0_Picture_5.jpeg)

Please ensure that you are logged into the main printer (Pack label) located in the Common Cradle Assembly area Logging in to this printer will also ensure the Product and Overpack labels will be generated on those printers

**Step 1:** Use responsibility 'ZTC Reconfiguration Mobile Apps' And navigate to 'WIP Completion Common Cradle'

**Step 2:** Enter the correct Organization and press 'Enter' on the keypad

**Step 3:** Enter the following details:

- LPN: Scan a new (pre-generated) LPN for each Overpack box
- Job: Scan or enter the Job number
- O. Pk Qty: Enter the quantity that fits into an overpack
- Qty: '1' (defaulted)

*Please note: Serialized cradle items must be completed 1 at a time.*

**Step 4:** In the 'SN' field, scan the Serial Number for the base component for the Cradle Assembly (the new Cradle Assembly will inherit the Serial Number from the base)

**Step 5:** If the Serial Number scanned was successfully validated by the TRS system, the completion process will continue, and the Product and Pack Labels will be printed.

*Please note: Report 'Zebra Common Cradle TRS Validation Details' can be used to check the serial numbers that have been validated by the TRS system.*

The following error messages can be displayed:
Metadata: "Sub heading": "WIP JOB ASSEMBLY COMPLETION (COMMON CRADLE): ........As part of the physical assembly process, it is required to perform an 'Assembly Completion' in Oracle for each cradle assembly that is configured. ![](_page_0_Picture_5.jpeg) Please ensure that you a............"

chunk_id2.Sub Heading 1: WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – WIP JOB ASSEMBLY COMPLETION (CC) .....

Text:
| Error Message            | Comments                                                                   |
|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Item or SN not validated | The Cradle Assembly was not successfully validated by the TRS system, so   |
| and approved by MTP      | the assembly itself must be checked/corrected first                        |
| SN: Invalid Serial       | The serial number of the base component does not exist in the supply       |
| Number                   | location specified in the job. A pick/move must be done into that location |
| Txn Failed [item no]     | The cup components are not available in the supply location specified in   |
| failed validation        | the job. A pick/move must be done into that location                       |
| Invalid Serial Number    | The serial number does not belong to this job/assembly                     |

The 'Next Kit' option is automatically activated, ready for the next 'SN' to be scanned

Continue completing the Cradle Assemblies until you reach the Overpack Quantity. When this happens, the Overpack label is automatically printed.

**Step 6:** Start a new Overpack by clicking on the 'Next Ov Pack' button. Repeat steps 5 and 6 until all Cradle Assemblies have been completed. Click on the 'Done' button

A 'Txn Success' message will be displayed at the bottom of the screen
